title: hepetis inermis
intro: Hepetis inermis, also known as Chinese Chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family native to China and other parts of East Asia. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which are derived from its flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Hepetis inermis include reducing fever, relieving headaches and sore throats, and promoting digestion, among others. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications such as creams and ointments.
